'''鈭歾-ng-m''' ('''zangama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unboldface|unboldface]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unboldface|unboldface]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-ng-m
|-
! Lemma
| zangama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zangamithi|zangamithi]] || [[word:zangamiji|zangamiji]] || [[word:zangamishi|zangamishi]] || [[word:zangami|zangami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zangamuthuth|zangamuthuth]] || [[word:zangamujuj|zangamujuj]] || [[word:zangamushush|zangamushush]] || [[word:zangam|zangam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zangamuthu|zangamuthu]] || [[word:zangamuju|zangamuju]] || [[word:zangamushu|zangamushu]] || [[word:zangamu|zangamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zangamufuth|zangamufuth]] || [[word:zangamufuj|zangamufuj]] || [[word:zangamufush|zangamufush]] || [[word:zangamuf|zangamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zangamethe|zangamethe]] || [[word:zangameje|zangameje]] || [[word:zangameshe|zangameshe]] || [[word:zangame|zangame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zangamothoth|zangamothoth]] || [[word:zangamojoj|zangamojoj]] || [[word:zangamoshosh|zangamoshosh]] || [[word:zangam|zangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zangamotho|zangamotho]] || [[word:zangamojo|zangamojo]] || [[word:zangamosho|zangamosho]] || [[word:zangamo|zangamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zangamofoth|zangamofoth]] || [[word:zangamofoj|zangamofoj]] || [[word:zangamofosh|zangamofosh]] || [[word:zangamof|zangamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zangam忙th忙|zangam忙th忙]] || [[word:zangam忙j忙|zangam忙j忙]] || [[word:zangam忙sh忙|zangam忙sh忙]] || [[word:zangam忙|zangam忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zangamathath|zangamathath]] || [[word:zangamajaj|zangamajaj]] || [[word:zangamashash|zangamashash]] || [[word:zangam|zangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zangamatha|zangamatha]] || [[word:zangamaja|zangamaja]] || [[word:zangamasha|zangamasha]] || [[word:zangama|zangama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zangamafath|zangamafath]] || [[word:zangamafaj|zangamafaj]] || [[word:zangamafash|zangamafash]] || [[word:zangamaf|zangamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zangamasha|zangamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozangamasha|gozangamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizangamasha|gokizangamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zangamn眉sha|zangamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozangamnkn眉sha|gozangamnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizangamn眉sha|gokizangamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zangamsh毛sha|zangamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozangamnksh毛sha|gozangamnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizangamsh毛sha|gokizangamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zangamrosha|zangamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozangamnkrosha|gozangamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizangamrosha|gokizangamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zangamusha|zangamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozangamnkmusha|gozangamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizangamusha|gokizangamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zangamsherasha|zangamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozangamnksherasha|gozangamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizangamsherasha|gokizangamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zangamngasha|zangamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozangamnkngasha|gozangamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizangamngasha|gokizangamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zangamyasha|zangamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozangamnkyasha|gozangamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizangamyasha|gokizangamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zangamyamasha|zangamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozangamnkyamasha|gozangamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizangamyamasha|gokizangamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zangamn眉sh毛sha|zangamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozangamnkn眉sh毛sha|gozangamnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizangamn眉sh毛sha|gokizangamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zangamn眉rosha|zangamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozangamnkn眉rosha|gozangamnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizangamn眉rosha|gokizangamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zangamn眉musha|zangamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozangamnkn眉musha|gozangamnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizangamn眉musha|gokizangamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zangamsh毛n眉sha|zangamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozangamnksh毛n眉sha|gozangamnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizangamsh毛n眉sha|gokizangamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zangamsh毛rosha|zangamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozangamnksh毛rosha|gozangamnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizangamsh毛rosha|gokizangamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zangamsh毛musha|zangamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozangamnksh毛musha|gozangamnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizangamsh毛musha|gokizangamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zangamron眉sha|zangamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozangamnkron眉sha|gozangamnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizangamron眉sha|gokizangamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zangamrosh毛sha|zangamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozangamnkrosh毛sha|gozangamnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizangamrosh毛sha|gokizangamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zangamromusha|zangamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozangamnkromusha|gozangamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizangamromusha|gokizangamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zangamun眉sha|zangamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozangamnkmun眉sha|gozangamnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizangamun眉sha|gokizangamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zangamush毛sha|zangamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozangamnkmush毛sha|gozangamnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizangamush毛sha|gokizangamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zangamurosha|zangamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozangamnkmurosha|gozangamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizangamurosha|gokizangamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zangam|zangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:z忙ng忙m|z忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozangam|hozangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoz忙ng忙m|hoz忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozangam|hohozangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoz忙ng忙m|hohoz忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zangam|n眉zangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉z忙ng忙m|n眉z忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zangam|n眉n眉zangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉z忙ng忙m|n眉n眉z忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zangam|n茂zangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂z忙ng忙m|n茂z忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zangam|n茂n茂zangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂z忙ng忙m|n茂n茂z忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzangam|luzangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luz忙ng忙m|luz忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzangam|luluzangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluz忙ng忙m|luluz忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizangam|lizangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liz忙ng忙m|liz忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizangam|lilizangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliz忙ng忙m|liliz忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozangam|kozangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koz忙ng忙m|koz忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozangam|kokozangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoz忙ng忙m|kokoz忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezangam|kezangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kez忙ng忙m|kez忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezangam|kekezangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekez忙ng忙m|kekez忙ng忙m]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
